attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 AMS (Autoimmune Mild Severity) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AMS casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SEQ (SPEC-DERM-03-00241) is derived from the source note number AMS-041 — maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-DERM-03 bucket.
Age (42) and sex_at_birth (female) are NOT stated in the source note and are required demographic fields — inferred placeholders; clinician to confirm on review.

Difficulty classified red_herring_laden: the alarming 'scalp on fire / bleeding / fear of infection' framing plus the new-shampoo cue and the seborrhoeic-dermatitis misdiagnosis trap are deliberate distractors from a benign excoriated psoriasis flare.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person after-hours visit whose bedside exam (palpation for fluctuance, cervical node exam, close inspection for honey-coloured crust) excluded secondary infection. Those clinician-only findings are sealed in 10/11 with telehealth_limits; video-observable skin appearance and patient self-report were placed in 01.objective_data_offered (verified:false). Presentation layer de-anchored to pre-diagnosis lay wording.

Baseline tier set T2 (not ED): true acuity is low but telehealth cannot palpate/examine to fully exclude early secondary infection, so timely in-person GP review within 24-48h with explicit infection safety-netting is the calibrated action rather than emergency escalation.

SNOMED/ICD-10-AM candidate codes assigned from model knowledge only and marked unverified_pending_terminology_receipt; scalp-psoriasis SNOMED (200873004) and ICD-10-AM L40.9 in particular need terminology-server confirmation.

No AMT code asserted for betamethasone valerate 0.1% scalp application (uncertain exact AMT concept id) — omitted rather than guessed per protocol §8; drug name and source-derived directions retained.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
